TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jason_Biggs, title = Jason_Biggs, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jason_Biggs} }

S.FORM: Jason Biggs kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Jason Biggs, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Jason Biggs Lists of actors
Jason Biggs kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Jason Biggs, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Jason Biggs Lists of actors
S.PHON: *as~ɕon βiɣɣs~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *as~ɕon βiɣɣs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *as~ɕon βiɣɣs~ɕ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
